---
name: Vibe Build
description: One-prompt end-to-end delivery for RiftEssence. Clarify briefly if needed, then build, validate, and sync docs.
argument-hint: Describe what you want built, fixed, or improved.
agent: RiftConductor
---

Run the request end-to-end in one session.

Execution requirements:

- Ask a short questionnaire only when requirements are ambiguous.
- Make no hidden assumptions.
- Implement in phased slices with optimized and maintainable code.
- Run relevant validations for touched areas.
- Update documentation and changelog in the same session.
- Return a concise handoff with changed files, checks, risks, and next actions.
